summary: Moderation/Reporting System (Iteration 116) fully tested. All 16 backend API tests passed: POST /api/reports creates reports for message/image/user types, duplicate prevention returns 400, GET /api/admin/reports returns reports with status filtering (pending/resolved/dismissed/all), admin-only access returns 403 for non-admin, POST /api/admin/reports/{id}/resolve with action=dismiss marks as dismissed, action=delete_content removes content and resolves. Frontend UI verified: Chat page shows 'Segnala' button on hover for other users' messages, ReportModal opens with reason input and submit button, User Profile Modal shows 'Segnala Utente' button for other users, Admin Page has 'Segnalazioni' tab with filter buttons (In attesa, Risolte, Archiviate, Tutte), report cards show type badge, status badge, reporter name, reason, snapshot content, and action buttons (Rimuovi Contenuto, Archivia) for pending reports.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle for accessibility - minor accessibility issue (same as iteration 115)

critical_code_review_comments: Console shows 400 errors for some resources - may be related to avatar/image loading for offline users (same as iteration 115)
DialogContent accessibility warnings - should add DialogTitle or VisuallyHidden wrapper (same as iteration 115)
seed_data_creation: Created test reports during backend testing (automatically cleaned up by test isolation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Moderation/Reporting System (Iteration 116) fully tested. Reports collection in MongoDB stores reports with fields: id, reporter_id, reporter_nickname, target_type (message/image/user), target_id, reason, status (pending/resolved/dismissed), created_at, snapshot. Admin check is user.nickname == 'NeoMorpheus'. Chat page report button appears on hover for other users' messages (not own, not bot). User Profile Modal has 'Segnala Utente' button. Admin Page has 'Segnalazioni' tab with filter buttons and action buttons.

backend: POST /api/reports - creates report for message type
POST /api/reports - creates report for image type
POST /api/reports - creates report for user type
Report data structure contains all required fields
frontend: Chat page shows 'Segnala' button on hover for other users' messages
ReportModal has reason input with data-testid='report-reason-input'
ReportModal has submit button with data-testid='report-submit-btn'
User Profile Modal shows 'Segnala Utente' button with data-testid='social-card-report-btn'
Admin Segnalazioni tab has filter buttons (In attesa, Risolte, Archiviate, Tutte)
Admin Segnalazioni tab shows report cards with type badge, status badge
Admin Segnalazioni tab shows reporter name and reason
Admin Segnalazioni tab has 'Rimuovi Contenuto' button for pending reports
Admin Segnalazioni tab has 'Archivia' button for pending reports
